Variables.Name: SourceMethod
Variables.Description: The source method for the trail.

Variables.Name: SourceName
Variables.Description: The name of the source - either the emitter or Actor.

Variables.Name: SourceStrength
Variables.Description: The strength of the tangent from the source point for each Trail.

Variables.Name: bLockSourceStength
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the source to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: SourceOffsetCount
Variables.Description:
SourceOffsetCount
	 	The number of source offsets that can be expected to be found on the instance.
	 	These must be named
	 		TrailSourceOffset#

Variables.Name: SourceOffsetDefaults
Variables.Description:
Default offsets from the source(s). 
	 	If there are < SourceOffsetCount slots, the grabbing of values will simply wrap.

Variables.Name: SelectionMethod
Variables.Description: Particle selection method, when using the SourceMethod of Particle.

Variables.Name: bInheritRotation
Variables.Description: Interhit particle rotation - only valid for SourceMethod of PET2SRCM_Particle.
